title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 3-B.  LOUISIANA AGRICULTURAL FINANCE ACT

§261.  Short title

A.  This Chapter shall be known and may be referred to as the "Louisiana Agricultural Finance Act."

Added by Acts 1983, No. 96, § 1, eff. July 23, 1983.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 3-B.  LOUISIANA AGRICULTURAL FINANCE ACT
§261.  Short title
A.  This Chapter shall be known and may be referred to as the "Louisiana Agricultural Finance Act."
Added by Acts 1983, No. 96, § 1, eff. July 23, 1983.
